audit_items.proof_trace: ldap_send_initial_request() returns ber_int_t (an integer), not a pointer — no NULL dereference of its return value is possible. All 9 call sites uniformly check *msgidp < 0 before using the value as a message ID; ldap_search() at search.c:244 directly returns the integer to its caller without storing it, which is correct. The property's premise of 'NULL-check before dereference' is inapplicable to an integer return type.
